blended.narrative: Lost Trail is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 9 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 4,047 ft. Looking ahead, 23 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 5" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.4" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 56".
